message:
refactor: remove dead io_leader variable and fix wheel index mutability

three_lane.rs: Remove the io_leader variable and its associated
dead-code branch in the parking logic. The variable was set to true
after a successful IO turn but only checked in a parking branch
that commented itself as "rarely hit." Since the IO leader parks
in epoll via try_turn_with (not via the parker), and the branch
added no behavior beyond an unconditional park(), it was dead code.
Removing it eliminates a misleading code path and an unused variable
warning.

wheel.rs: Change `let mut i = 0` to `let i = 0` in drain_expired.
The loop body uses swap_remove (which brings the last element to
position i) instead of incrementing i, so i is never mutated.
The mut was a leftover from the pre-swap_remove implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
